sections.paragraph:
m. a spreading out, once Eze 27:20, בִּגְדֵי־חֹפֶשׁ לְרִכְבָּה “cloths spread out for riding,” see the root No. 1.

[“(2) a bed, a couch, place of lying down, Psa 88:6, בַּמֵּתִים חָפְשִׁי “among the dead is my couch.” More commonly “among the dead I (am) laid prostrate;” comp. חָיִיתִי in verse Psa 88:5, also the root No. 2, and חָפְשׁוּת.”]
